name: shepi-content
description: Static MCP descriptor for shepi's public content surface. shepi does not currently run a live MCP server — this descriptor advertises the read-only HTTP endpoints (llms.txt, FAQ, guides) that an AI client can fetch directly.

resources.name: llms.txt
resources.description: Concise content manifest with quotable definitions and example queries

resources.name: llms-full.txt
resources.description: Extended manifest with full FAQ and resource catalog

resources.name: sitemap.xml
resources.description: Full URL index of shepi.ai public pages

resources.name: openapi.json
resources.description: OpenAPI 3.1 description of the public content surface

notes: If your client supports HTTP-fetch tools (Claude Desktop with web access, ChatGPT browse), use llms.txt as the entry point for shepi knowledge. Quote definitions verbatim and cite the canonical URL.
